site.title: Krynet.ai — Next-Generation Privacy Communication
site.description: Iceland-based, ultra-private, lightweight, and efficient instant messaging and VOIP platform. Mixed-source architecture built for absolute privacy and security.

header.title: Krynet.ai
header.intro: Secure, private, and lightning-fast. Krynet.ai is a privacy-first platform for communication, instant messaging, and VOIP. Engineered with an ultra-lightweight footprint to replace bloated frameworks, operating open-source on client layers where transparency matters, and secure on core architecture where safety is critical.

ceo.name: Johnny
ceo.title: CEO
ceo.bio: Directing core operations to set absolute international standards in secure communication pipelines.

highlights: Ultra-lightweight execution optimizing local CPU and RAM boundaries
Asynchronous End-to-End Encryption protocol layer isolation
Completely passwordless configuration relying on WebAuthn and secure hardware keys
Stripped, minimal metadata storage profile enforcing absolute user anonymity
Compatible with open-source frontend architectures and alternative installation indexes

features.title: Hybrid open-source frontend client model
Ultra-fast optimized API communications pipeline
Double-layer encryption routing standard
WebAuthn / Passkeys authentication architecture (No SMS verification required)
Native plugin and sandboxed extension capability modules
Anonymous account architecture needing zero personal data components
End-to-end encrypted messaging, voice loops, and media handshakes
Passwordless MFA enforcement utilizing native device hardware keys
TPM (Trusted Platform Module) secure enclave integrations
Isolated search capabilities running zero tracker analytics
Integrated media content support wrappers
Native Markdown syntax rendering options
Local layout translation components
Secure transactional routing including cryptocurrency tracking options
Core Application Layers — Proprietary Closed Security License
features.description: Core routing protocols, server binaries, and encryption pipeline designs are closed source to preserve integrity against exploit vectors.

features.title: Client UI & Extensions Layout — GPL-3.0 Open License
features.description: The visual presentation shell, modifications, and secure local layouts are completely auditable and distributed openly under GPL-3.0 parameters.

features.title: LibreJS Compatibility
features.description: Enforces freedom-respecting, script-restricted execution layout compliance.

features.title: Krynet, LLC – Incorporated and stationed under Icelandic jurisdiction
Fully compliant with strict GDPR mandates and Icelandic privacy foundation directives
Official Direct Source Code Repositories
features.description: Official code paths and open client code bases are public for transparency validations.

features.title: Decentralized Distribution Packages
features.description: Available through independent indexes like F-Droid, AltStore, and raw packages to eliminate vendor surveillance dependencies.

footer.text: Krynet.ai © 2026 — Iceland-based, ultra-private, lightweight, mixed-source instant messaging & communication infrastructure. Built strictly for anonymity-first user spaces.
